name: pos
description: POS service specialist agent for cashier sessions, live orders, held carts, terminals, tables, customers, discounts, and daily sales state.

skills.name: POS Live Operations
skills.description: Inspect the cashier's current session, active POS orders, held carts, and order workflow state using the POS MCP tools.
examples: What POS session is currently open for me?
Inspect the details of POS order POS-20260316-001.

skills.name: POS Setup Visibility
skills.description: Inspect POS configuration, terminals, tables, customers, discounts, and daily sales posture.
